mapper.select: SELECT sd.user_id AS userId, sd.user_name AS userName, sd.role, sd.confirmed, sd.open_hope AS openHope, sd.remarks, u.account_type AS accountType, s.hours, s.memo AS scheduleMemo FROM sf_selected_date sd LEFT JOIN sf_users u ON sd.user_id = u.userid LEFT JOIN sf_schedule s ON sd.date = s.date AND sd.user_name = s.username WHERE sd.date = #{date} ORDER BY u.account_type ASC, sd.user_name ASC
